failedAssertions.reason: README freshness is wired into the canonical lint command and passed, and CI separately generates the docs site, but the maintainer-facing required final validation only names build/test/lint. The canonical local gate exercised from AGENTS.md and services.yaml does not include the site command, so sample-backed site generation is still outside the normal root validation path.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for command-line validation covering shared-checkout isolation, temp-output rules, and evidence expectations for sample-truth validators.
